substances.name: Bleach (Sodium Hypochlorite)
substances.description: Common household cleaning agent. Ingestion causes chemical burns to mouth, throat, and stomach.

substances.name: Antifreeze (Ethylene Glycol)
substances.description: Highly toxic automotive coolant. Sweet taste makes it attractive to children and pets. Causes metabolic acidosis and kidney failure.
